columns.name: SPRIDEN_PIDM
columns.description: Internal identification number of the person.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_ID
columns.description: This field defines the identification number used to access person on-line.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_LAST_NAME
columns.description: This field defines the last name of person.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_FIRST_NAME
columns.description: This field identifies the first name of person.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_MI
columns.description: This field identifies the middle name of person.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_CHANGE_IND
columns.description: This field identifies whether type of change made to the record was an ID number change or a name change. Valid values: I - ID change, N - name change.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_ENTITY_IND
columns.description: This field identifies whether record is person or non-person record. It does not display on the form. Valid values: P - person, C - non-person.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_ACTIVITY_DATE
columns.description: This field defines the most current date record is created or changed.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_USER
columns.description: USER: The ID for the user that most recently updated the record.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_ORIGIN
columns.description: ORIGIN: The name of the Banner Object that was used most recently to update the row in the spriden table.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_SEARCH_LAST_NAME
columns.description: The Last Name field with all spaces and punctuation removed and all letters capitalized.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_SEARCH_FIRST_NAME
columns.description: The First Name field with all spaces and punctuation removed and all letters capitalized.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_SEARCH_MI
columns.description: The MI (Middle Initial) field with all spaces and punctuation removed and all letters capitalized.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_SOUNDEX_LAST_NAME
columns.description: The Last Name field in SOUNDEX phonetic format.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_SOUNDEX_FIRST_NAME
columns.description: The First Name field in SOUNDEX phonetic format.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_NTYP_CODE
columns.description: NAME TYPE CODE: The field is used to store the code that represents the name type associated with a person's name.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_CREATE_USER
columns.description: Record Create User: This field contains Banner User ID which created new record

columns.name: SPRIDEN_CREATE_DATE
columns.description: Record Create Date: This field contains date new record created

columns.name: SPRIDEN_DATA_ORIGIN
columns.description: DATA SOURCE: Source system that generated the data

columns.name: SPRIDEN_CREATE_FDMN_CODE
columns.description: PII DOMAIN: PII Domain of the user who created the spriden row.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_SURNAME_PREFIX
columns.description: SURNAME PREFIX: Name tag preceding the last name or surname. (Van, Von, Mac, etc.)

columns.name: SPRIDEN_SURROGATE_ID
columns.description: SURROGATE ID: Immutable unique key

columns.name: SPRIDEN_VERSION
columns.description: VERSION: Optimistic lock token.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_USER_ID
columns.description: USER ID: The user ID of the person who inserted or last updated this record.

columns.name: SPRIDEN_VPDI_CODE
columns.description: VPDI CODE: Multi-entity processing code.

queries.name: Find Name by ID
queries.description: Find a person's name by their ID.
